Body.Content:
When a user who has access to the SharePoint app in Teams clicks a SharePoint page or news link in Teams chat or channels, the link will open inside the SharePoint app in Teams (if available) instead of the mobile browser

GA date: August CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: SharePoint app in Teams
